creator: parakleta@darkreality.org
text:
Not really an important change, just a small quality of life thing.  It would be nice if the `/usr/local/share/icewm/themes/default/default.theme` file was configured to use the FreeBSD background image.

i.e.

< DesktopBackgroundImage="default.png"
> DesktopBackgroundImage="default-freebsd.png"

Thanks.
